← Back to DM VTT Toolkit

Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 9, 2026

Short version: We collect nothing. Your data lives in your browser. Your API key is never sent to us.

Who we are

DM VTT Toolkit is a free, open-source browser tool built by Tony B (Tonyb29) to help tabletop RPG game masters prepare content for Foundry VTT and other virtual tabletop platforms.

What data we collect

None. There is no server, no database, no account system, and no analytics. We do not collect, store, or transmit any personal information.

What is stored locally in your browser

The following data is saved to your browser's localStorage only — it never leaves your device:

  • Claude API key — stored only if you choose to enter one. Used solely to make requests to Anthropic's API directly from your browser.
  • Campaign presets — your campaign world data (NPCs, continents, journals).
  • Celestial calendar — your moon and calendar configuration.
  • UI preferences — welcome banner dismissed state, etc.

You can clear all of this at any time by clearing your browser's site data for this domain, or by using your browser's developer tools.

Your Claude API key

If you enter a Claude API key, it is stored in your browser's localStorage and sent directly from your browser to Anthropic's API (api.anthropic.com) when you use AI features. It is never transmitted to our servers — we have no servers to send it to.

We recommend treating your API key like a password. Do not share it or use it on shared/public computers.

Third-party services

  • Anthropic (Claude API) — AI features send your prompt and the Claude API key to api.anthropic.com. Subject to Anthropic's Privacy Policy.
  • allorigins.win — The "Extract from URL" feature in the Stat Block Parser uses api.allorigins.win, a public proxy service, to fetch the content of web pages you provide. The URL you enter is sent through this third-party service. Do not use this feature with URLs that contain sensitive information.
  • Ko-fi — The donation link opens ko-fi.com in a new tab. Ko-fi is an independent platform subject to their own privacy policy. No data is shared with Ko-fi unless you choose to donate.
  • Cloudflare — This site is hosted on Cloudflare Workers. Cloudflare may log basic request metadata (IP address, timestamp, URL) as part of standard infrastructure operation. See Cloudflare's Privacy Policy.
  • GitHub — Source code is hosted publicly at github.com/Tonyb29/DM-VTT-Toolkit. Bug reports submitted via GitHub Issues are subject to GitHub's Privacy Policy.

Cookies

We do not use cookies.

Children's privacy

This tool is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect any information from children.

Changes to this policy

If this policy changes materially, the "Last updated" date above will reflect that. As there is no user account system, we cannot notify you directly.

Contact

Questions or concerns? Open an issue at github.com/Tonyb29/DM-VTT-Toolkit/issues.

Open source

This tool is open source under the MIT License. You can inspect exactly what it does with your data by reading the source code.
